prompt: A dramatic vertical dark-fantasy anime key visual poster for the RPG {argument name="game title" default="夢喰-BAKU-"}. Center the composition around 3 human figures layered in depth. In the background, a large intimidating adult man is shown from the chest up, facing forward, with messy wavy dark hair, light stubble, a partially open dark shirt, and a shadowed, ominous presence; his face is mostly obscured by darkness and framing, making him feel mysterious and threatening. In the foreground left, place 1 young man in a dynamic three-quarter pose lunging toward the viewer with his right hand stretched out dramatically, wearing a blue jacket over a white hoodie, with short tousled brown hair and a determined expression. In the foreground right, place 1 young woman standing slightly behind him, with long brown hair, a pale blouse, and a dark skirt or high-waisted bottom with a belt; she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. Use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. Add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. Integrate the large Japanese title {argument name="title text" default="夢喰"} vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. At the bottom, include the Japanese tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="分かるだろ？俺達が必要とされる理由がよ"} in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. In the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading {argument name="logo text" default="DCC Project"} with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. Overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror RPG, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的竖版暗黑奇幻动画关键视觉海报，用于 RPG 游戏 {argument name="game title" default="夢喰-BAKU-"}。构图中心为 3 位具有深度层次的人物。背景中，一位身材魁梧、令人畏惧的成年男性以半身像呈现，正视前方，留着凌乱的深色波浪卷发，带有淡淡胡茬，身穿半敞的深色衬衫，散发着阴郁且不祥的气息；他的面部大部分被阴影和构图遮挡，显得神秘而危险。前景左侧，放置 1 位年轻男性，以动态的三分之四侧身姿势向观众冲刺，右手戏剧性地伸出，身穿白色连帽衫外搭蓝色夹克，留着凌乱的棕色短发，表情坚定。前景右侧，放置 1 位站在他身后稍远处的年轻女性，留着棕色长发，身穿浅色衬衫和深色裙子或高腰下装，系着腰带；她双手合十放在嘴边或胸前，神情焦虑而脆弱。采用阴郁的超自然氛围，画面中环绕着黑色和深紫色的烟雾、墨迹般的阴影、幽灵般的纹理，边缘处带有像素故障碎片。背景中加入对角线排列的断裂锁链、数个悬浮的矩形框架或屏幕，以及人物身后隐约可见的室内走廊。在中心位置垂直融入大型日语标题 {argument name="title text" default="夢喰"}，采用粗体白色书法汉字呈现，带有紫色喷溅、划痕和发光效果，并与人物部分重叠。底部包含日语标语 {argument name="tagline text" default="分かるだろ？俺達が必要とされる理由がよ"}，使用优雅的白色字体，其中部分句子以紫色高亮显示。右上角添加白色工作室 Logo，文字为 {argument name="logo text" default="DCC Project"}，配有莲花状标志和大型衬线字母。整体风格：精致的插画级关键视觉艺术，适用于心理恐怖 RPG，超精细动画绘画，高对比度，电影级光影，深邃的黑色，靛蓝与紫罗兰色调，不祥的超自然能量，海报级排版，优质宣传视觉图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗黑奇幻 RPG 关键视觉海报：此提示词可生成一张精致的动画风格竖版关键视觉图，适用于心理恐怖类 RPG 游戏宣传、标题界面及社交媒体公告。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
